testimonials.name: Rajesh Sharma
testimonials.quote: RentalHub has changed my business. I went from 15 bookings a month to 60+ within 3 months. The 8% commission is incredibly fair — I tried other platforms and was paying 30%. This is the future of bike rental.

testimonials.name: Mohammed Farooq
testimonials.quote: The dashboard is clean and simple. I manage my entire fleet from my phone. Payments come in on time, support is responsive. RentalHub is the best thing that happened to my rental business.

testimonials.name: Anita Desai
testimonials.quote: Tourist season used to be chaotic. Now I get advance bookings through RentalHub, my availability is always updated, and I don't lose customers to last-minute walk-ins at other shops.

testimonials.name: Priya Nair
testimonials.quote: Rented an Activa for a week to commute to work. The entire process — from search to pickup — was seamless. The shop owner was professional and the bike was in perfect condition.

testimonials.name: Arjun Mehta
testimonials.quote: Way cheaper than Ola and Uber for daily use. I rented a scooter for a month and saved ₹4,000 compared to cab rides. Booking process was smooth and the app is very easy to use.

testimonials.name: Kavya Reddy
testimonials.quote: Rented a Royal Enfield for a Spiti Valley trip. RentalHub found me a trusted local shop with proper insurance. The bike was well-maintained and the trip was unforgettable.
